## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows project standards (ESLint + Prettier)
- [ ] No ESLint errors
- [ ] Code has been self-reviewed

### Testing

- [ ] Unit/integration tests added (Vitest + React Testing Library)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Implementation tested locally
- [ ] Regression testing performed

### Project Requirements

- [ ] **Mobile-First**: Styling prioritizes small screens before Desktop
- [ ] **Accessibility**: Semantic tags used (`<article>`, `<main>`, `<nav>`)
- [ ] **Visual Fidelity**: Layout is Pixel Perfect
- [ ] **Performance**: React Query used to avoid unnecessary fetches
- [ ] **Styling**: Styled Components only (no Tailwind, Material UI, or Bootstrap)
- [ ] Error handling for backend offline scenarios (when applicable)

### Documentation & Review

- [ ] README updated (if Docker/run instructions changed)
- [ ] Evidence added to the card (screenshots/videos) — when applicable
- [ ] Code reviewed by at least one peer

---

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
